is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of Gabonese children with prior mild or severe P. falciparum malaria.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Paper studies host factors (NO/NOS, cytokines, NOS2 promoter and TNF-a promoter polymorphisms). No P. falciparum drug-resistance markers (Pfcrt, Pfdhfr, Pfdhps, Pfk13, Pfmdr1, etc.) are reported.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: No drug-resistance marker frequencies; only NO/NOS activity and cytokine levels reported as means.

sub_country_location.evidence: Samples from Albert Schweitzer Hospital in Lambaréné, Gabon (sub-national site).

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: No collection dates given; recruited from an ongoing longitudinal study, no usable time window stated.

african_field_samples.evidence: Human field/clinical samples from Gabonese children in Lambaréné, Gabon.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Participants recruited from an ongoing longitudinal prospective study at Albert Schweitzer Hospital, but not a drug-resistance dataset.

supplement.evidence: No drug-resistance data exist in this paper; supplement would not help.

assessment.summary: Immunological study measuring NO production, NOS activity, and plasma cytokine levels in 28 Gabonese children with prior mild or severe P. falciparum malaria. Reports no drug-resistance markers or frequencies.
exclusion_reasons: No curated P. falciparum drug-resistance markers reported
No usable collection time window given
